languages.text: "Губернатор-полковник передает несколько возможных стратегий. Мобильные отряды с псайкерами, что постоянно перемещаются и тем самым отвлекают Погонщиц от поселений. Выманивание на подготовленные позиции для уничтожения. И массовое отвлечение Погонщиц в отдаленные безлюдные регионы".

"The Colonel-Governor has sent several possible strategies. Mobile units with psykers that are constantly on the move and thus draw the Drovers away from settlements. Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."
languages.original_text: "Губернатор-полковник передает несколько возможных стратегий. Мобильные отряды с псайкерами, что постоянно перемещаются и тем самым отвлекают Погонщиц от поселений. Выманивание на подготовленные позиции для уничтожения. И массовое отвлечение Погонщиц в отдаленные безлюдные регионы".

Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."

"The Castellan-Governor has sent several possible strategies. Mobile units with psykers that are constantly on the move and thus draw the Drovers away from settlements. Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."

"The Castellan-Governor has sent several possible strategies. Mobile units with psykers that are constantly on the move and thus draw the Drovers away from settlements. Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."

Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."

languages.text: 「城代はいくつかの戦略を提案しています。移動する部隊にサイキック能力者を入れて、移動を繰り返すことで、ドルーバーを村から引き離す。ドルーバーを誘い込み、事前に用意した場所に誘導して、殲滅する。そして、ドルーバーを遠隔の荒れ地へ誘い込む大規模誘導作戦。」
languages.original_text: "The Castellan-Governor has sent several possible strategies. Mobile units with psykers that are constantly on the move and thus draw the Drovers away from settlements. Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."

traits.locale_text: 「城代はいくつかの戦略を提案しています。移動する部隊にサイキック能力者を入れて、移動を繰り返すことで、ドルーバーを村から引き離す。ドルーバーを誘い込み、事前に用意した場所に誘導して、殲滅する。そして、ドルーバーを遠隔の荒れ地へ誘い込む大規模誘導作戦。」

languages.text: «{nc|La coronel-gobernadora|El coronel-gobernador} tiene diversas propuestas: unidades móviles con psíquicos para alejar a los Pastores de los asentamientos, atraerlos hasta posiciones preparadas para destruirlos y, por último, atraer a los Pastores a gran escala hasta regiones remotas y desiertas».
languages.original_text: "The Colonel-Governor has sent several possible strategies. Mobile units with psykers that are constantly on the move and thus draw the Drovers away from settlements. Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."

traits.locale_text: «{nc|La coronel-gobernadora|El coronel-gobernador} tiene diversas propuestas: unidades móviles con psíquicos para alejar a los Pastores de los asentamientos, atraerlos hasta posiciones preparadas para destruirlos y, por último, atraer a los Pastores a gran escala hasta regiones remotas y desiertas».

languages.text: “总督上校提交了数套可行战略：一，配备灵能者的机动部队不断转移，将拒生花引离定居点；二，将其诱入预设阵地后歼灭；三，大规模引诱拒生花至偏远荒芜地区。”
languages.original_text: "The Colonel-Governor has sent several possible strategies. Mobile units with psykers that are constantly on the move and thus draw the Drovers away from settlements. Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."

traits.locale_text: “总督上校提交了数套可行战略：一，配备灵能者的机动部队不断转移，将拒生花引离定居点；二，将其诱入预设阵地后歼灭；三，大规模引诱拒生花至偏远荒芜地区。”

languages.text: "{nc|Die Colonel-Gouverneurin|Der Colonel-Gouverneur} schlägt mehrere gangbare Strategien vor. Mobile Einheiten mit Psionikern, die ständig in Bewegung bleiben, um die Treiber von den Siedlungen abzulenken. Sie führen sie in vorbereitete Hinterhalte, um sie zu vernichten. Und das Gros der Treiber wird in entlegene Wüstenregionen gelockt."
languages.original_text: "The Colonel-Governor has sent several possible strategies. Mobile units with psykers that are constantly on the move and thus draw the Drovers away from settlements. Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."

Und das Gros der Treiber wird in entlegene Wüstenregionen gelockt."

languages.text: "Vali Albay, birkaç olası strateji gönderdi. Sürekli hareket hâlinde olan ve böylece Çobanları yerleşim yerlerinden uzaklaştıran ruhsezerli mobil birimler. Onları, yok etmek için hazırlıklı olduğumuz mevzilere çekeceğiz. Çobanlar; büyük çapta ıssız, terk edilmiş bölgelere çekilecek."
languages.original_text: "The Colonel-Governor has sent several possible strategies. Mobile units with psykers that are constantly on the move and thus draw the Drovers away from settlements. Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."

traits.locale_text: "Vali Albay, birkaç olası strateji gönderdi. Sürekli hareket hâlinde olan ve böylece Çobanları yerleşim yerlerinden uzaklaştıran ruhsezerli mobil birimler. Onları, yok etmek için hazırlıklı olduğumuz mevzilere çekeceğiz. Çobanlar; büyük çapta ıssız, terk edilmiş bölgelere çekilecek."

languages.text: « {nc|La gouverneure-colonelle|Le gouverneur-colonel} nous a suggéré différentes stratégies. Dépêcher des unités mobiles comptant des psykers, qui seraient chargées d'éloigner les Chasseurs de la colonie en restant constamment en mouvement. Attirer les créatures à des emplacements choisis dans le but de les détruire. Ou bien les appâter en masse vers des régions désertiques et reculées. »
languages.original_text: "The Colonel-Governor has sent several possible strategies. Mobile units with psykers that are constantly on the move and thus draw the Drovers away from settlements. Luring them to prepared positions in order to destroy them. And the large-scale luring of the Drovers into remote, deserted regions."
